title: rosa pendulina var. norica
intro: Rosa pendulina var. norica, also known as the Rosa pendulina or the Alpine Rose, is a deciduous shrub species belonging to the family Rosaceae. Traditionally used in folk medicine, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, attributed to its high content of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits associated with Rosa pendulina var. norica include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Herbal preparations of Rosa pendulina var. norica, including infusions, teas, and tinctures, are used to harness its medicinal properties, although it's essential to consult with a healthcare professional before using any herbal remedy.
